sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 브로드컴은 AI 반도체 수요 급증에 힘입어 2분기 매출 221억 8,700만 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2분기 GAAP 기준 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 1.91달러, Non-GAAP 기준 희석 EPS는 2.44달러를 기록했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 2분기 AI 반도체 매출은 108억 달러로 전년 대비 143% 성장했으며, 3분기에는 AI 반도체 매출이 전년 대비 200% 이상 성장한 160억 달러에 이를 것으로 전망됩니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2분기 GAAP 기준 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 1.91달러, Non-GAAP 기준 희석 EPS는 2.44달러를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 3분기 매출 가이던스인 294억 달러 달성 여부와 AI 반도체 부문의 성장 모멘텀이 지속될지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 avgo-05032026x8kxex99.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Broadcom Inc. Announces Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results and Quarterly Dividend • Revenue of $22,187 million for the second quarter, up 48 percent from the prior year period • GAAP net income of $9,310 million for the second quarter; Non-GAAP net income of $12,074 million for the second quarter • Adjusted EBITDA of $15,244 million for the second quarter, or 69 percent of revenue • GAAP diluted EPS of $1.91 for the second quarter; Non-GAAP diluted EPS of $2.44 for the second quarter • Cash from operations of $10,493 million for the second quarter, less capital ex  Normalized numeric aliases: $22,187 million = 221억 8,700만 달러; $9,310 million = 93억 1,000만 달러; $12,074 million = 120억 7,400만 달러; $15,244 million = 152억 4,400만 달러; $10,493 million = 104억 9,300만 달러; $231 million = 2억 3,100만 달러; $10,262 million = 102억 6,200만 달러; $29.4 billion = 294억 달러; $9,310 = 9,310달러; $1.91 = 1.91달러; $2.44 = 2.44달러; $231 = 231달러.

84 percent from the prior year period • Third quarter fiscal year 2026 Non-GAAP operating income guidance of approximately 67 percent of projected revenue (1) • Third quarter fiscal year 2026 Adjusted EBITDA guidance of approximately 68 percent of projected revenue (1) PALO ALTO, Calif. – June 3, 2026 – Broadcom Inc. (Nasdaq: AVGO), a global technology leader that designs, develops and supplies semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions, today reported financial results for its second quarter of fiscal year 2026, ended May 3, 2026, provided guidance for its third quarter of fiscal year 2026 and announced its quarterly dividend. “Broadcom achieved record revenue, operating profit and free cash flow in Q2 driven by accelerating growth in AI semiconductor revenue and strong operating leverage. Q2 semiconductor revenue from AI of $10.8 billion grew 143% year-  Normalized numeric aliases: $10.8 billion = 108억 달러; $10.8 = 10.8달러; 84 percent = 84%; 67 percent = 67%; 68 percent = 68%.

recast, driven by increasing demand for custom AI accelerators and AI networking,” said Hock Tan, President and CEO of Broadcom Inc. “The momentum continues and in Q3 we expect semiconductor revenue from AI to grow over 200 percent year-over-year to $16.0 billion.” “Q2 consolidated revenue grew 48% year-over-year to a record $22.2 billion. Adjusted EBITDA increased 52% year-over-year to a record $15.2 billion, representing 69% of revenue,” said Kirsten Spears, CFO of Broadcom Inc. “In Q3 we expect consolidated revenue growth to increase 84% year-over-year to $29.4 billion, with non-GAAP operating margin stable at 67% reflecting our strong operating leverage.” ________________________________ (1) The Company is not readily able to provide a reconciliation of projected non-GAAP   Normalized numeric aliases: $16.0 billion = 160억 달러; $22.2 billion = 222억 달러; $15.2 billion = 152억 달러; $29.4 billion = 294억 달러; $16.0 = 16.0달러; $22.2 = 22.2달러; $15.2 = 15.2달러; $29.4 = 29.4달러; 200 percent = 200%.
